heading: Queued Arto Heino external pull targets for the Pyth/QA geometry lane
text:
type: task
tags: [qa, pyth2, external-sources, arto-heino, geometry]
body: Added explicit external pull targets for the ongoing Pyth/QA reinterpretation subproject. The queued Arto sources are `https://artoheino.com/tag/geometry/` as a geometry-facing prior-art page to mine for posts, diagrams, and terminology, and `https://github.com/arto-heino` as a code/repo source to mine for implementations, notebooks, or computational artifacts. These are now recorded locally in `pythagoras_quantum_world_rt/external_pull_targets.json` and linked from the subproject manifest so they can be pulled into the validated lane intentionally rather than ad hoc.
